overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial urban district at sunset. The character moves from a covered walkway along a street beneath elevated highways, past palm trees and industrial buildings with smokestacks visible against an orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open sidewalk

events.description: exits covered concrete structure into open street with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large cylindrical support pillars for the overhead structure
metal safety railings along the edge of the walkway
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
massive concrete elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the street
dark industrial buildings with metal fire escapes

segments.scene_description: The character begins under a covered concrete walkway with large support pillars, then emerges into an open street lined with palm trees. The elevated highway structure dominates the skyline ahead, while industrial buildings with fire escapes line the left side. The lighting shifts from shadow to warm golden hour sun as the character exits the covered area.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk as vehicles pass on the right
character crosses street and steps up onto opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection while vehicles pass by on the right

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving past the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
tall street lamp post with horizontal arm
yellow painted lines marking pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings. After waiting for a car to pass on the right, the character crosses the asphalt road. The elevated highway remains visible ahead, now closer, while palm trees shift to the left side of the frame.

agents.ego_description: walking along littered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with multiple cross arms and wires
low concrete barriers with orange and white stripes
scattered cardboard boxes and debris on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway structure which now passes directly overhead, casting shadows on the sidewalk. The area is industrial with utility poles, concrete barriers, and scattered cardboard debris. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the character moves deeper into the industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street corner with large billboard

events.description: character turns left at corner, entering industrial courtyard area

agents.ego_description: turning left at street corner and entering an industrial courtyard with garage doors

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'ALL FOODS' text and cartoon character
industrial buildings with large roll-up garage doors
green and blue neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prominent 'ALL FOODS' billboard on the left while walking past more industrial buildings. Around the 50-second mark, the character turns left at a corner, entering a more enclosed industrial courtyard with garage doors. The elevated highway is now visible to the right in the distance, and neon signs glow on buildings ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial urban district that transitions from a sun-drenched street into a shadowed, enclosed industrial courtyard. It begins under a covered concrete walkway, moving past large support pillars and emerging into the warm golden light of an open street lined with palm trees and industrial buildings. As the character approaches an intersection and crosses the asphalt road, the perspective shifts toward a massive elevated highway that soon looms directly overhead, casting deep shadows across a sidewalk cluttered with concrete barriers and debris. The scene then opens up toward a prominent All Foods billboard before the camera turns left at a corner, leaving the highway behind. Finally, the movement leads into a more secluded courtyard characterized by garage doors and the glow of neon signs against the industrial backdrop.
